channel.title: aws-codepipeline on Ben Selby
channel.description: Recent content in aws-codepipeline on Ben Selby

item.title: Comparison: AWS CodePipeline, GitHub Actions, and Jenkins
item.description: This post has come about as I’ve written up this content in different formats multiple times, and it’s easier to write this up once, and just reference back. The comparison is valid as of May 2020. If you visit this page after that, the comparison table may be different. The tools this post is going to compare are: AWS CodePipeline (As I happen to be working in the AWS space at the moment) Jenkins GitHub Actions A couple of things to note:
